creator: segin2005@gmail.com
text:
Update for x11-wm/matwm2. All apologies for issuing as a .shar; I'm a little rusty at updating ports and couldn't get cvs to make a diff.

Fix: extract shar, replacing old x11-wm/matwm2 port, repeat steps in 'how to repeat', note version of 0.1.2pre3 this time around.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/matwm2 ; sudo make all deinstall reinstall ; /usr/local/bin/matwm2 -version | head -n 1
